# Competitive Signal Report — Enterprise AI Platform (Tuesday, 21 July 2026)

> **Bottom line:** Competitors are pushing AI agent capabilities and platform integration, but gaps in true omnichannel voice, deterministic governance, and predictable TCO persist. Kore.ai's ABL and analyst leadership provide a strong counter-narrative against these emerging weaknesses.

## Three signals that matter

### Glean's HR Focus Highlights CX Gaps
**What happened —** Glean reported workers spend nearly a full day fixing AI mistakes, and announced a partnership with LTM to unlock enterprise AI value by building trusted context for AI. ([The HR Digest](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxQUERIbXBoMi1PYks0bXkxQkg0aFVTakVuZ1lZUmNUdEhFa0FTcS1mYldsbGtTbHpMOFlPc0dQS0s1TnhTN0F1Q1FIdjVXRGRsR29zU1l1MEgxeWIxbUpIZG1OdVJoSm16d21nWHhzN1BZajNsYVBlZ1k5X29mbWdzUzA1RG5lWmNWWEhCSDU5cl8wRVNXTzU1bFF4MFFUTVU?oc=5), [The Times of India](https://news.google.?oc=5))
**What it means for Kore.ai —** Glean's focus on employee knowledge and AI mistake correction highlights its lack of CX/voice capabilities. We can emphasize Kore.ai's proven enterprise CX platform and deterministic ABL that prevents such costly errors, especially in regulated industries.

### Salesforce Expands Agentforce with SMB Focus
**What it is —** Salesforce launched an 'SMB Growth Kit' in India, integrating Agentforce, Slack, and Tableau, and also unveiled AI-powered student experiences at REVA University using Agentforce. ([NDTV Profit](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Techcircle](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxQWXJqRmVOWVByOWNFZ2Z4NHJvVmNod1FQdjl3V2Y3cnR0NUhybXN0SHNxbGQzM255UmJLQm5zTkVYdnlGNlBTSzBCMWpvQUlraTFZYmNrUWdHVUFOX183Y0ZjMlhBajhPRnFFX1hMQmk5TVBUSklFYlRZQ3ZnSXpoM2RJWmlQU0hBN1hES0R2UXc4M1VCNTZJ?oc=5))
**What it means for Kore.ai —** Salesforce is aggressively expanding Agentforce into new verticals and geographies, including SMBs. We must highlight our platform's proven enterprise-grade robustness and analyst leadership in CX conversational AI, contrasting it with Salesforce's broader, less specialized approach and potential platform lock-in.

### ServiceNow Positions as Enterprise AI Platform
**What it is —** ServiceNow is positioning itself as the enterprise AI platform, with articles discussing its AI governance capabilities and the real test of agentic AI being process redesign. ([Milk Road](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxOTGpITmtsdjNETVJlSkktNFRpVFFOT19hWjBTTGJCYjBjYXloQ3pVSFRERWRKVmxQWWpaZG96QVZMSUREdFFtaDlqNjdOTlIwVGsxZldnWnk5S2JRYjJMS3lHNGdZeEdaWWkxeDhFS2ZwcExjTm1QX0huVkIzSDBMY3daTQ?oc=5), [The Futurum Group](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxQdDhDcXVPbnBKRmIxLXY0dmRmejhpSXQ4Z01td1o5TXJmVjI2LXBtaFBhVDlhdnlpbUhtX1dPYTA1NVlwRTA2LVlzbWsteW5ZeFdFbk80d2ZHcmJaWWhOYm9CQzdIRmtqeFpITjdxbVNtVjVMX2ZiUHFxdnNqYlowWU9R?oc=5))
**What it means for Kore.ai —** ServiceNow is framing its broad AI platform play, but its ITSM heritage and reliance on "assists" consumption for AI can lead to TCO unpredictability and complexity. We should emphasize Kore.ai's purpose-built, CX-native platform with transparent, deterministic pricing and governance, contrasting it with ServiceNow's potentially complex, IT-centric approach.

## Signal priority table

| Competitor | Move (dated) | Threat | Kore.ai counter |
|---|---|---|---|
| Glean | (2026-07-20) Workers spend nearly a full day fixing AI mistakes; partners with LTM to unlock enterprise AI value - [The HR Digest](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxQUERIbXBoMi1PYks0bXkxQkg0aFVTakVuZ1lZUmNUdEhFa0FTcS1mYldsbGtTbHpMOFlPc0dQS0s1TnhTN0F1Q1FIdjVXRGRsR29zU1l1MEgxeWIxbUpIZG1OdVJoSm16d21nWHhzN1BZajNsYVBlZ1k5X29mbWdzUzA1RG5lWmNWWEhCSDU5cl8wRVNXTzU1bFF4MFFUTVU?oc=5) | Med | Focus on employee knowledge, not CX; deterministic ABL |
| Agentforce (Salesforce) | (2026-07-20) Launches 'SMB Growth Kit' in India with Agentforce; AI-powered student experiences at REVA University - [NDTV Profit](https://news.google.?oc=5) | Med | Enterprise-grade CX vs. broad platform; analyst leadership |
| ServiceNow Agent Platform | (2026-07-20) Positions as enterprise AI platform, discusses AI governance and process redesign - [Milk Road](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxOTGpITmtsdjNETVJlSkktNFRpVFFOT19hWjBTTGJCYjBjYXloQ3pVSFRERWRKVmxQWWpaZG96QVZMSUREdFFtaDlqNjdOTlIwVGsxZldnWnk5S2JRYjJMS3lHNGdZeEdaWWkxeDhFS2ZwcExjTm1QX0huVkIzSDBMY3daTQ?oc=5) | Med | ITSM heritage, complex TCO vs. purpose-built CX |
| Five9 | (2026-07-20) To report Q2 2026 financial results on August 6 - [Business Wire](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxOOWlPb1ZGaUZ0NmFQUE9MUm55OEhaY3FBVFJaZUdnV05Kd0JvUC0tTS1EUi1RTWVCZ1YxTThCWUJFQURKWDVPcTktbHVHbnNKaTRIYTNvcHBJQ3dEdDAwb2RQbDMtdmpFVmxaTDlnbTRNb1ZuZVJ4eFFUZWh4UG9Xc2t3ekZwVnJWV2JCLXF0bWhiYXZ4dzl3X3c0XzM4dU40R01lOEswTTVKaUFuOTgwTGdnbGZsM3NkUGE2QUZydHMxRE53SWc?oc=5) | Low | Upcoming earnings may reveal AI impact on seat model |

## Watch for
- Continued analyst evaluations that may further differentiate pure-play CX AI platforms from broader enterprise AI plays.
- Any shifts in pricing models from competitors as they grapple with the economics of autonomous agents.
- Further integration announcements from ServiceNow regarding Moveworks and its impact on their agentic AI strategy.

## Recommended actions
- Reinforce Kore.ai's leadership in enterprise CX conversational AI with analyst validation as a key differentiator against broad-platform plays.
- Arm sales with clear talking points on the TCO unpredictability and governance risks associated with "assist"-based consumption models and LLM-dependent agents.
- Highlight Kore.ai's deterministic ABL and compile-time validation as a critical advantage for regulated industries and mission-critical CX workflows.
- Emphasize Kore.ai's true omnichannel capabilities, contrasting them with voice-first or employee-focused AI solutions.
